section_title: If a time is stipulated for the payment of the debt, or performance of the
content:
177. If a time is stipulated for the payment of the debt, or performance of the
pawnor's
promise, for which the pledge is made, and the pawnor makes default in
right to
redeem payment of the debt or performance of the promise at the stipulated time, he
may redeem the goods pledged at any subsequent time before the actual
sale of them; but he must, in that case, pay, in addition, any expenses which
have arisen from his default.

Pledge by
